about.heading: About
about.text: I thrive in environments where creativity and innovation are valued, constantly seeking out new ways to approach problems and deliver impactful solutions. My goal is simple to leverage my skills, experience, and passion to make a meaningful impact in software development. I am a capable team player who can adjust to any difficult circumstance. I can operate effectively both independently and in a group setting.

projectList.title: Titan Eye Plus
projectList.description: A leading eyewear e-commerce platform developed for Titan Eye Plus, offering seamless product discovery, online eye-care solutions, and a modern shopping experience. The platform focuses on performance, scalability, SEO, and responsive design.

keyFeatures.text: Built scalable frontend applications using Next.js and React.js
Integrated Magento services for product catalog and order management
Optimized Core Web Vitals using Redis caching and performance enhancements
Developed reusable and responsive UI components using SCSS
Implemented API integrations and automation scripts for testing

projectList.title: Linux Tools
projectList.description: Built a comprehensive web-based toolkit tailored for DevOps engineers and system administrators to streamline server troubleshooting and daily operational tasks. The app integrates various diagnostic tools to enhance productivity and simplify common server-side challenges.

keyFeatures.text: DNS Checker to quickly verify domain records and identify misconfigurations
Port Scanner to detect open ports and assess network vulnerabilities
IP Lookup tool providing geolocation, ISP, and detailed IP data
Built-in Linux Command Library for instant access to essential terminal commands
Bonus tools like JSON Formatter, Text Comparator, and Server Diagnostics for enhanced productivity

projectList.title: Fastrack Eyewear
projectList.description: An e-commerce eyewear platform for Fastrack, designed to deliver a fast, engaging, and mobile-friendly shopping experience for fashion-conscious customers. The platform emphasizes performance, SEO, and modern UI design.

keyFeatures.text: Developed modern and responsive storefront experiences using Next.js
Integrated Magento backend services for product and inventory management
Implemented performance optimizations to improve page speed and user experience
Built reusable UI components and maintained design consistency across pages
Ensured SEO optimization and cross-device compatibility

projectList.title: Cargo Desk
projectList.description: CargoDesk is a transport management system designed for managing daily orders, invoices, and vehicle-related documents such as insurance, PUC, and fitness certificates. A key highlight is the Bulk SMS functionality powered by the Twilio SMS API, along with a robust contact management system that supports multiple import methods.

keyFeatures.text: Implemented Bulk SMS sending using Twilio SMS API for marketing.
Developed a contact management module allowing bulk import from Google Contacts API, CSV, vCard, and manual entry.
Secured the platform with JWT-based authentication for sign-up and login.
Utilized MySQL for efficient data storage and retrieval.
Designed a responsive UI using Material UI, Tailwind CSS, and SCSS for a modern and clean interface.

projectList.title: Point Stream Panel
projectList.description: A dynamic web-based platform built to streamline the management of sports tournaments, matches, and real-time scoring. Key highlights include match booth setups, referee-based access control, live scoreboard updates from multiple devices, detailed match history with obtained scores, and automated scorecard generation.

keyFeatures.text: Blazing-fast performance with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Static Site Generation (SSG) using Next.js.
Robust backend API with JWT authentication, WebSocket-powered real-time communication, and seamless MySQL database integration.
Real-time multi-referee scoring system with secured role-based access, ensuring accurate and transparent match updates.

projectList.title: Runway Sunglasses
projectList.description: A premium sunglasses showcase platform under House of Titan that allows users to explore various eyewear collections and submit inquiries. The project emphasizes modern design, performance, SEO, and responsive user experiences.

keyFeatures.text: Designed modern and responsive UI using React.js and Next.js
Developed backend services with Node.js and Redis caching
Implemented SEO best practices for improved search visibility
Ensured smooth experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

projectList.title: Tic Tac Toe Game
projectList.description: A modern, interactive Tic Tac Toe game built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features smooth animations, a responsive glass-morphism UI, Single Player mode with an intelligent computer opponent, and Online Multiplayer mode using Socket.IO for real-time gameplay.

keyFeatures.text: Developed a real-time multiplayer Tic Tac Toe game using Next.js, TypeScript, and Socket.IO.
Implemented two game modes: Single Player (AI) and Multiplayer (WebSockets).
Built real-time room-based matchmaking with instant move syncing.
Built reusable components for X and O icons with SVG animations
Ensured mobile-first responsive layout using aspect-square and CSS grid
Focused on clean TypeScript structure and component organization

projectList.title: Urban Market
projectList.description: I built a fully responsive clone of Urban Marketplace, a modern e-commerce platform where users can explore a wide variety of products, add items to their cart, and seamlessly place orders.

keyFeatures.text: Modern and responsive UI for smooth product browsing
Add to cart and complete checkout functionality
Built with React.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Netlify

projectList.title: Memo Mind
projectList.description: A web-based platform designed to enhance memory retention and learning through interactive flashcards and quizzes. Users can create, share, and study flashcards on various topics, making learning engaging and effective.

keyFeatures.text: Create and share flashcards for effective learning
Interactive quizzes to reinforce knowledge retention
User-friendly interface for easy navigation and study

projectList.title: Frame Expert
projectList.description: An in-store smart recommendation system deployed across Titan Eye Plus outlets across India. The application captures facial measurements and recommends suitable eyewear using virtual try-on technology and intelligent fitting algorithms. Key features include face scanning, barcode scanning for product identification, and integration with Salesforce and SAP APIs for efficient data management.

keyFeatures.text: Built smart frame recommendation system for Titan Eye Plus stores
Integrated Virtual Try-On (VTO) and IndiFit calculator
Implemented React Camera for face scanning and measurements
Enabled barcode scanning and product identification
Integrated Salesforce and SAP APIs for data management

projectList.title: Bollywood MDB
projectList.description: A Bollywood entertainment portal that aggregates trending movie news, celebrity updates, and industry insights from multiple trusted sources into a single engaging platform.

keyFeatures.text: Developed dynamic news feed for Bollywood content
Integrated content from multiple reliable news sources
Collaborated with backend teams for seamless data integration
Resolved front-end issues and improved user experience

projectList.title: Insight GURU
projectList.description: A comprehensive examination portal admin panel used to manage exams, student data, results, and related academic operations through a responsive and user-friendly dashboard.

keyFeatures.text: Developed responsive admin dashboard using React.js
Implemented state management using Redux
Built reusable UI components with Material-UI
Integrated backend APIs to display examination and student data

contact.heading: Contact
contact.message: Want to discuss a project or just say hi? My inbox is always open. 👋
